articles.title: SEC moves to delay decision on ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF into next year
articles.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission moved to delay a decision on the proposed ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF into next year.

articles.title: JUST IN: SEC Delays Review of ARK 21 Shares Spot Bitcoin ETF – Here’s the New Date
articles.description: The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has announced a delay in its decision on the spot listing of the ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF application. The SEC has extended the deadline for an additional 60 days to decide whether to approve or disapprove the rule change proposed in the filing. In order to have sufficient […] Continue Reading: JUST IN: SEC Delays Review of ARK 21 Shares...

articles.title: Lawmakers urge SEC Chair Gensler to allow spot bitcoin ETFs ‘immediately’
articles.description: A group of lawmakers pressed SEC Chair Gary Gensler to urgently allow the listing of a spot bitcoin ETF on Tuesday.

articles.title: Circle Makes a Giant Listing Move for Stellar (XLM)
articles.description: Circle, one of the largest stablecoin companies, announced that it has taken an important step regarding the international payment network Stellar. Continue Reading: Circle Makes a Giant Listing Move for Stellar (XLM)

articles.title: Ethereum Hits $10 Billion in Revenue Faster Than Facebook & Microsoft
articles.description: Ethereum, the leading smart contract platform, has reached over $10 billion in cumulative revenue since its launch in 2015. This growth rate outpaces many of the largest software companies in history according to a new report by crypto brokerage firm Caleb & Brown.It took Ethereum around 7.5 years to reach $10 billion in annual revenue, faster than Meta (formerly Facebook), which reached...
